nutshell.heading: Promotion
items: OMS Non-ADV promotions to target different marketplaces
Send non-ADV promotions as ADV on v2/promotion for marketplaces
Simple discounte Roundel and fake promotion from and to for channel promotions

nutshell.heading: Operational enhancements
items: Show and filter marketplace on Non-ADV promotions.
Add minimum stock threshold indicator so that the store staff is aware of the stock when placing an order
Support Salesforce email sending by adding Salesforce_delivery_locations
Improve promotion sync jobs to run daily.
Add details to the OMS tabs to indicate the details of the tab
